prompt_context.article_theme: Nvidia's speculative GTC 2026 announcements reveal deep integration of Groq's LPU for disaggregated inference (AFD), alongside aggressive advancements in CPO networking, rack architectures, and storage systems, profoundly reshaping the AI hardware supply chain.
prompt_context.structure_summary: The article opens with an overview of Nvidia's GTC 2026 hardware announcements, then deep-dives into the Groq LPU architecture and its specific role in disaggregated LLM inference (AFD and Speculative Decoding). It subsequently details the physical LPX rack system and networking topologies before mapping out Nvidia's broader rack (Kyber/Oberon/Feynman) and CPO roadmaps. The piece concludes with new storage reference designs (STX/CMX) and exclusive supply chain implications.
prompt_context.target_audience: Senior hardware engineers, AI infrastructure architects, semiconductor supply chain analysts, and tech investors.
prompt_context.translation_voice: Professional tech-analyst Chinese. The voice should be objective and rigorous, using precise semiconductor, networking, and AI terminology while maintaining the investigative edge of the original text.
prompt_context.section_role: Details the historical and technical evolution of Groq's LPU architecture to explain what exactly Nvidia has productized.
translation_notes: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).
key_points: LPU relies on single-purpose units ('slices') and scratchpad SRAM rather than general-purpose cores.
Gen 1 was built on a mature 14nm node to prove the architecture.
Gen 2 failed due to C2C SerDes speed issues.
Gen 3 is the version Nvidia is bringing to market.
guidelines: Sentence Restructuring for Flow: Actively break down lengthy English sentences with multiple relative clauses into shorter, cohesive Chinese sentences. Use appropriate logical connectors (因此, 相比之下, 此外) to ensure a native, fluid paragraph structure.

Domain-Specific Precision: Strictly adhere to the provided terminology. Differentiate clearly between networking terms (scale-up vs. scale-out), semiconductor terms (tapeout, reticle size), and AI modeling terms (stateful, draft models).

Preserve Technical Notation: Keep all mathematical formulas, bandwidth specifications (e.g., 448Gbit/s uni-di, 112G), node names (TSMC N3P, SF4), and connector types (80DP Paladin, OSFP) exactly as they appear in the source.

Handle Acronyms Consistently: For newly introduced concepts (AFD, MBOM, CPO), provide the full Chinese translation followed by the English acronym in parentheses on the first occurrence. Use the acronym or the Chinese term consistently thereafter.

Maintain Analyst Tone: Preserve the investigative and authoritative tone of SemiAnalysis (e.g., 'Behind the paywall, we will reveal...'). Translate these directly but with professional phrasing (e.g., '在付费内容中，我们将揭晓...').

Title Translation: Ensure the translated title captures all key subjects mentioned in the original title (Groq LP30, LPX Rack, AFD, etc.) without dropping any semantic components, using standard separator punctuation (e.g., spaces or ' | ').

article_challenges.location: LPU Network / Feynman NVL1152 Networking Topologies
article_challenges.issue: Dense mathematical and topological descriptions (e.g., '256 LPUs x 90 lanes x 112Gbps/8 x 2 directions = 645TB/s').
article_challenges.suggestion: Do not alter the formulas. Ensure the surrounding text precisely explains the variables (e.g., lanes, Gbps, directions). Use clear spatial language for topologies (e.g., '菊链配置' for daisy chain, '全互联' for all-to-all).

article_challenges.location: GPU and LPU Integration: Attention FFN Disaggregation (AFD)
article_challenges.issue: Intersection of LLM software architecture (Attention, FFN, token routing, KV cache) and hardware mapping.
article_challenges.suggestion: Strictly use standard Chinese AI terms (注意力机制, 前馈网络, 动态KV缓存加载). Ensure the logical causality (why stateful goes to GPU and stateless goes to LPU) is flawlessly translated.

article_challenges.issue: Long, clause-heavy sentences detailing corporate strategy and hardware teardowns (e.g., 'This design has effectively taken key pluggable transceiver items...').
article_challenges.suggestion: Break these sentences down. Translate 'taken... and put them on...' into a sequence of actions in Chinese to maintain readability.

terminology.translation: 注意力与前馈网络解耦
terminology.note: Separating the computation of attention mechanisms (mapped to GPUs) and feed-forward networks (mapped to LPUs) to optimize inference.
Integration of optical transceivers and switch ASICs on the same package to reduce power and increase bandwidth.
The total number of processes or GPUs participating in a distributed training or inference cluster.
Mounting components on both the top and bottom sides of a PCB directly opposite each other to minimize trace length.
High-speed internal memory used for temporary storage of calculations, data, and other work in progress.
Whether an operation depends on stored dynamic data (like KV cache) or only on the immediate input.
Smaller models used in speculative decoding to quickly generate candidate tokens for a larger model to verify.
Optical modules placed in the middle of the PCB rather than on the edge (pluggables), reducing electrical trace lengths.
The maximum area that a semiconductor lithography tool can expose in a single step.
Uni-directional data transmission over a lane.
如 7nm, 5nm, 3nm，需要注意翻译时不要语义重复，如 N3 node直接翻译成3纳米制程

understanding.role_in_article: Details the historical and technical evolution of Groq's LPU architecture to explain what exactly Nvidia has productized.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the focus from the business rationale of the Groq deal to the specific hardware architecture of the acquired IP.
understanding.relation_to_next: Introduces the concept of 'scratchpad SRAM', which directly sets up the need to explain memory hierarchy in the subsequent section.
key_points: LPU relies on single-purpose units ('slices') and scratchpad SRAM rather than general-purpose cores.
Gen 1 was built on a mature 14nm node to prove the architecture.
Gen 2 failed due to C2C SerDes speed issues.
Gen 3 is the version Nvidia is bringing to market.
translation_notes: Technical terminology must be precise: 'streaming registers' (流式寄存器), 'scratchpad SRAM' (便笺式SRAM/暂存器), 'tape out' (流片), 'C2C SerDes' (芯片间串行器/解串器).

translations: Groq 首个且唯一公开宣布的 LPU 架构在其 ISCA 2020 论文中得到了详细阐述。与连接众多通用核心的典型硬件架构不同，Groq 将架构重新组织为多组单用途单元，这些单元与其他不同用途的单元组相连，他们将这些组命名为“切片（slices）”。在功能单元之间是流式寄存器（streaming registers）和暂存SRAM，用于功能单元之间相互传递数据。Groq 选择了单层暂存SRAM而非多层内存层级结构，以确保硬件执行的确定性。
具体而言，LPU 架构包含用于向量运算的 VXM 切片、用于加载/存储数据的 MEM 切片、用于张量形状操作的 SXM 切片，以及用于执行矩阵乘法的 MXM 切片。在空间上，这些切片呈水平布局，允许数据水平流动。在切片内部，指令跨单元垂直泵送。从概念上看，LPU 类似于一个垂直泵送指令、水平泵送数据的脉动阵列（systolic array）。
数据流和指令流的设计需要细粒度的流水线操作以实现高性能。由于 LPU 架构使计算具有确定性，编译器可以激进地调度和重叠指令以隐藏延迟。LPU 对高带宽 SRAM 的使用和激进的流水线设计，是实现 LPU 低延迟的两个主要因素。

第一代 LPU 基于传统的格芯（GlobalFoundries）14nm 制程节点设计，由 Marvell 负责芯片的物理设计。当其在 2020 年流片时，与同行相比这是一个成熟得多的制程节点，当时主流的 AI 芯片平台大多采用台积电（TSMC）的 N7 平台。对于一款专注于验证 Groq 架构并将其以推理为中心的设计推向市场的早期产品而言，这是合理的选择。14nm 制程节点已经成熟、相对容易被理解，并且适合用于初始芯片，因为在这一阶段，架构差异化比将硅片推向最前沿制程更为重要。
其卖点之一是，该芯片可以完全在美国本土制造和封装，相比之下，其竞争对手则严重依赖亚洲半导体供应链：逻辑芯片和封装在台湾地区完成，而 HBM 则来自韩国。
自那以后，由于执行问题，Groq 的路线图停滞不前，至今未出货第二代 LPU（LPU 2）。这使得 Groq LPU 在与竞争对手路线图的对比中显得更加过时。与 7nm 时代的同行相比，曾经显著但仍可控的制程节点劣势已经扩大为更为悬殊的差距，如今所有领先的加速器平台都将在 2026 年迈向 3nm 级制程。

后续的 Groq LPU 2 专为三星（Samsung）晶圆代工厂（foundry）的 SF4X 制程节点设计，具体在三星的奥斯汀晶圆厂（fab）生产，这使得他们能够延续 Groq 在美国本土制造的宣传口径。三星还为其提供后端设计支持。选择三星是出于其提供的优惠条款与投资，当时三星晶圆代工厂正难以为其先进制程节点寻找客户，且错失了 AI 逻辑芯片客户。毫不意外，三星是 Groq 随后在 2024 年 8 月 D 轮融资中的主要投资者，最近一次投资则发生在 2025 年 9 月英伟达“收购”之前。
然而，由于设计问题，Groq LPU 2 从未实现产品化。芯片上的芯片间串行器/解串器（C2C SerDes）无法达到宣传的 112G 速率，导致该设计出现故障，正如我们早前在加速器模型中所详述的那样。第三代 Groq LPU 才是英伟达将要产品化的版本。
